name: grok-plugin
description: Routes high-volume work to Grok Build via a hardened wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. Prefer when the task needs stronger reasoning than Gemini Flash; install agy-plugin for cheaper lower-intelligence bulk work.

interface.displayName: grok-plugin — grok as a subagent for higher-intelligence bulk work
interface.shortDescription: grok as a subagent for higher-intelligence bulk work
interface.longDescription: Routes high-volume work to Grok Build via a hardened wrapper with tiers, background jobs, structured failure codes, digest guards, and verification gates. Prefer when the task needs stronger reasoning than Gemini Flash; install agy-plugin for cheaper lower-intelligence bulk work.
defaultPrompt: Use grok-delegate to generate exhaustive unit tests for this module.
